ops.text: Revoke Chrome special privileges and normalize browser enforcement
Whitelist Trimmer and AddisMatric; Add export button to Quarantine list
Updating Samsung Galaxy S23 model ID from marketing name 's23' to technical ID 'dmq' to satisfy Firebase Test Lab requirements.

ops.find_block:
- name: 'Run Samsung Real Device Tests'
        run: |
          gcloud firebase test android run \
            --type robo \
            --app artifact_drop/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk \
            --device model=a10,version=29,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=a13,version=33,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=s23,version=34,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --timeout 2m
ops.replace_with:
- name: 'Run Samsung Real Device Tests'
        run: |
          gcloud firebase test android run \
            --type robo \
            --app artifact_drop/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk \
            --device model=a10,version=29,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=a13,version=33,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=dmq,version=34,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --timeout 2m

operations.find_block:
- name: 'Run Samsung Real Device Tests'
        run: |
          gcloud firebase test android run \
            --type robo \
            --app artifact_drop/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk \
            --device model=a10,version=29,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=a13,version=33,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=s23,version=34,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --timeout 2m
operations.replace_with:
- name: 'Run Samsung Real Device Tests'
        run: |
          gcloud firebase test android run \
            --type robo \
            --app artifact_drop/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk \
            --device model=a10,version=29,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=a13,version=33,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=dmq,version=34,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --timeout 2m
